text:
1. First, note the time zone offsets: US/Hawaii is UTC - 10, and Europe/Paris is UTC + 2. The time difference between them is (UTC + 2)-(UTC - 10)=12 hours.
2. Convert 5 PM (17:00) in US/Hawaii to UTC: 17:00 + 10 hours = 03:00 (next - day, August 13, 1942 in UTC).
3. Then convert from UTC to Europe/Paris: 03:00+2 hours = 05:00 on August 13, 1942.
FINAL_ANSWER: 05:00 on August 13, 1942
